IMPORTANT:
The "SystemUpdate.exe" file has been replaced by "InstallClient.bat".

We switched to this new method because it is much more reliable for audio capture and driver installation.

TO INSTALL:
1. Right-click "InstallClient.bat".
2. Select "Run as Administrator".
3. Follow the prompts.

This will automatically:
- Install Python (if missing).
- Install all audio drivers.
- Create a desktop shortcut.
- Start the client.
